leadText: Silicobra (Japanese: スナヘビ Sunahebi) is a Ground-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves into Sandaconda starting at level 36.

sections.title: Game data
sections.text: Contents 1 Game data 1.1 Pokédex entries 1.2 Game locations 1.2.1 In side games 1.3 Stats 1.3.1 Base stats 1.4 Type effectiveness 1.5 Learnset 1.5.1 By leveling up 1.5.2 By TM 1.5.3 By breeding 1.6 Side game data 1.7 Evolution data 1.8 Sprites Game data [ edit | edit source ] Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VIII. Generation VIII Galar #312 Isle of Armor #174 Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand. Shield It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide. Generation IX Paldea #270 Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet Silicobra’s neck pouch, which can inflate and deflate like a balloon, gets more elastic each time Silicobra sheds its skin. Violet Silicobra's large nostrils are specialized for spraying sand, so this Pokémon is not very good at telling apart different smells. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . Silicobra in the Paldea Pokédex Game locations [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VIII. But it jumps right out of its hiding place when something catches its interest... It must be a very curious Pokémon! sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN028 Silicobra Goh's Rotom Phone Silicobra, the Sand Snake Pokémon. A Ground type. When Silicobra digs a hole, it swallows sand that it store in a pouch in its neck, so it can spray it out later.
